import React from'react';import{CheckCircleIcon,XCircleIcon}from'@heroicons/react/24/outline';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const SkillsList=_ref=>{let{skills,type='found'}=_ref;if(!skills||skills.length===0){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-gray-500 text-center py-4",children:type==='found'?'No matching skills found':'No missing skills - Great job!'});}const getSkillColor=skill=>{// You can add logic to categorize skills by type
const frontendSkills=['React','React.js','ReactJS','Vue','Angular','HTML','CSS','JavaScript','Tailwind'];const backendSkills=['Node.js','Node','NodeJS','Express','Python','Django','MongoDB'];const cloudSkills=['AWS','Azure','GCP','Cloud'];if(frontendSkills.includes(skill))return'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';if(backendSkills.includes(skill))return'bg-green-100 text-green-800';if(cloudSkills.includes(skill))return'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800';return'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800';};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"flex flex-wrap gap-2",children:skills.map((skill,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"group relative",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:`inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium ${getSkillColor(skill)}`,children:[type==='found'?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CheckCircleIcon,{className:"h-4 w-4 mr-1 text-green-500"}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(XCircleIcon,{className:"h-4 w-4 mr-1 text-red-500"}),skill]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"absolute bottom-full left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 mb-2 px-2 py-1 bg-gray-900 text-white text-xs rounded opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity whitespace-nowrap pointer-events-none",children:type==='found'?'✓ You have this skill':'✗ Add this skill'})]},index))});};export default SkillsList;
